235	/**
236	 * Validate rotation for conflicts (double-booking, invalid lanes, buffer violations)
237	 * Internal function used by multiple server functions
238	 */
239	async function validateRotationConflictsInternal(
240	  rotation: {
241	    id?: string
242	    trackWorkoutId: string
243	    membershipId: string
244	    startingHeat: number
245	    startingLane: number
246	    heatsCount: number
247	    laneShiftPattern: LaneShiftPattern
248	  },
249	  options?: {
250	    excludeAllForMembership?: boolean
251	  },
252	): Promise<ValidationResult> {
253	  const db = getDb()
254	  const conflicts: RotationConflict[] = []
255	
256	  // Get all heats for the event with venue lane count
257	  const heatsRaw = await db
258	    .select({
259	      heatNumber: competitionHeatsTable.heatNumber,
260	      venueId: competitionHeatsTable.venueId,
261	      venueLaneCount: competitionVenuesTable.laneCount,
262	    })
263	    .from(competitionHeatsTable)
264	    .leftJoin(
265	      competitionVenuesTable,
266	      eq(competitionHeatsTable.venueId, competitionVenuesTable.id),
267	    )
268	    .where(eq(competitionHeatsTable.trackWorkoutId, rotation.trackWorkoutId))
269	
270	  // Map with default lane count if venue not set
271	  const heats = heatsRaw.map((h) => ({
272	    heatNumber: h.heatNumber,
273	    laneCount: h.venueLaneCount ?? 10, // Default to 10 lanes if no venue set
274	  }))
275	
276	  if (heats.length === 0) {
277	    conflicts.push({
278	      rotationId: rotation.id ?? "new",
279	      conflictType: "invalid_heat",
280	      message: "No heats found for this event",
281	    })
282	    return {
283	      conflicts,
284	      effectiveHeatsCount: 0,
285	      requestedHeatsCount: rotation.heatsCount,
286	      truncated: true,
287	    }
288	  }
289	
290	  const heatMap = new Map(heats.map((h) => [h.heatNumber, h]))
291	
292	  // Count how many heats actually exist in the requested range
293	  let effectiveHeatsCount = 0
294	
295	  // Validate each heat in the rotation - skip non-existent heats (don't treat as error)
296	  for (let i = 0; i < rotation.heatsCount; i++) {
297	    const heatNumber = rotation.startingHeat + i
298	    const heat = heatMap.get(heatNumber)
299	
300	    // Skip heats that don't exist - they just won't be assigned
301	    if (!heat) {
302	      continue
303	    }
304	
305	    effectiveHeatsCount++
306	
307	    // Calculate lane for this heat
308	    let laneNumber = rotation.startingLane
309	
310	    switch (rotation.laneShiftPattern) {
311	      case LANE_SHIFT_PATTERN.SHIFT_RIGHT:
312	        laneNumber = ((rotation.startingLane - 1 + i) % heat.laneCount) + 1
313	        break
314	    }
315	
316	    // Validate lane number
317	    if (laneNumber < 1 || laneNumber > heat.laneCount) {
318	      conflicts.push({
319	        rotationId: rotation.id ?? "new",
320	        conflictType: "invalid_lane",
321	        message: `Lane ${laneNumber} is invalid for heat ${heatNumber} (max: ${heat.laneCount})`,
322	        heatNumber,
323	        laneNumber,
324	      })
325	    }
326	  }
327	
328	  // Check for double-booking with existing rotations
329	  // Skip this check entirely if we're doing a batch replace for this membership
330	  if (!options?.excludeAllForMembership) {
331	    const existingRotations = await db
332	      .select()
333	      .from(competitionJudgeRotationsTable)
334	      .where(
335	        and(
336	          eq(
337	            competitionJudgeRotationsTable.trackWorkoutId,
338	            rotation.trackWorkoutId,
339	          ),
340	          eq(
341	            competitionJudgeRotationsTable.membershipId,
342	            rotation.membershipId,
343	          ),
344	          // Exclude self if updating a single rotation
345	          ...(rotation.id
346	            ? [ne(competitionJudgeRotationsTable.id, rotation.id)]
347	            : []),
348	        ),
349	      )
350	
351	    // Expand current rotation
352	    const currentAssignments = expandRotationToAssignments(
353	      {
354	        ...rotation,
355	        id: rotation.id ?? "new",
356	        competitionId: "", // Not needed for expansion
357	        notes: null,
358	        createdAt: new Date(),
359	        updatedAt: new Date(),
360	        updateCounter: null,
361	      },
362	      heats,
363	    )
364	
365	    // Expand existing rotations and check for overlaps
366	    for (const existing of existingRotations) {
367	      const existingAssignments = expandRotationToAssignments(existing, heats)
368	
369	      // Check for overlapping heats
370	      for (const current of currentAssignments) {
371	        for (const exist of existingAssignments) {
372	          if (current.heatNumber === exist.heatNumber) {
373	            conflicts.push({
374	              rotationId: existing.id,
375	              conflictType: "double_booking",
376	              message: `Judge is already assigned to heat ${current.heatNumber}`,
377	              heatNumber: current.heatNumber,
378	              laneNumber: current.laneNumber,
379	            })
380	          }
381	        }
382	      }
383	    }
384	
385	    // Get minHeatBuffer from event settings (default to 2)
386	    const [eventSettings] = await db
387	      .select({
388	        minHeatBuffer: trackWorkoutsTable.minHeatBuffer,
389	      })
390	      .from(trackWorkoutsTable)
391	      .where(eq(trackWorkoutsTable.id, rotation.trackWorkoutId))
392	
393	    const minHeatBuffer = eventSettings?.minHeatBuffer ?? 2
394	
395	    // Check for buffer violations
396	    for (const existing of existingRotations) {
397	      const existingAssignments = expandRotationToAssignments(existing, heats)
398	
399	      if (existingAssignments.length === 0) continue
400	
401	      // Get the range of the existing rotation
402	      const existingHeatNumbers = existingAssignments.map((a) => a.heatNumber)
403	      const existingStart = Math.min(...existingHeatNumbers)
404	      const existingEnd = Math.max(...existingHeatNumbers)
405	
406	      // Calculate buffer zones
407	      const bufferAfterStart = existingEnd + 1
408	      const bufferAfterEnd = existingEnd + minHeatBuffer
409	      const bufferBeforeStart = existingStart - minHeatBuffer
410	      const bufferBeforeEnd = existingStart - 1
411	
412	      // Check if any heat in the current rotation falls within buffer zones
413	      for (const current of currentAssignments) {
414	        const { heatNumber } = current
415	
416	        // Check buffer zone after existing rotation
417	        if (heatNumber >= bufferAfterStart && heatNumber <= bufferAfterEnd) {
418	          conflicts.push({
419	            rotationId: existing.id,
420	            conflictType: "buffer_violation",
421	            message: `Heat ${heatNumber} is within the buffer zone (needs ${minHeatBuffer} heat gap after rotation ending at heat ${existingEnd})`,
422	            heatNumber,
423	          })
424	        }
425	
426	        // Check buffer zone before existing rotation
427	        if (heatNumber >= bufferBeforeStart && heatNumber <= bufferBeforeEnd) {
428	          conflicts.push({
429	            rotationId: existing.id,
430	            conflictType: "buffer_violation",
431	            message: `Heat ${heatNumber} is within the buffer zone (needs ${minHeatBuffer} heat gap before rotation starting at heat ${existingStart})`,
432	            heatNumber,
433	          })
434	        }
435	      }
436	    }
437	  }
438	
439	  return {
440	    conflicts,
441	    effectiveHeatsCount,
442	    requestedHeatsCount: rotation.heatsCount,
443	    truncated: effectiveHeatsCount < rotation.heatsCount,
444	  }
445	}
446	
447	/**
448	 * Create a judge rotation (internal helper)
449	 */
450	async function createRotationInternal(params: {
451	  teamId: string
452	  competitionId: string
453	  trackWorkoutId: string
454	  membershipId: string
455	  startingHeat: number
456	  startingLane: number
457	  heatsCount: number
458	  laneShiftPattern?: LaneShiftPattern
459	  notes?: string
460	}): Promise<CompetitionJudgeRotation> {
461	  const db = getDb()
462	
463	  // Permission check
464	  await requireTeamPermission(
465	    params.teamId,
466	    TEAM_PERMISSIONS.MANAGE_COMPETITIONS,
467	  )
468	
469	  // Determine lane shift pattern from hierarchy: param > event default > competition default > STAY
470	  let laneShiftPattern = params.laneShiftPattern
471	
472	  if (!laneShiftPattern) {
473	    // Get event defaults
474	    const [event] = await db
475	      .select({
476	        defaultLaneShiftPattern: trackWorkoutsTable.defaultLaneShiftPattern,
477	        trackId: trackWorkoutsTable.trackId,
478	      })
479	      .from(trackWorkoutsTable)
480	      .where(eq(trackWorkoutsTable.id, params.trackWorkoutId))
481	
482	    if (event?.defaultLaneShiftPattern) {
483	      laneShiftPattern = event.defaultLaneShiftPattern as LaneShiftPattern
484	    } else if (event?.trackId) {
485	      // Fall back to competition defaults
486	      const [competition] = await db
487	        .select({
488	          defaultLaneShiftPattern: competitionsTable.defaultLaneShiftPattern,
489	        })
490	        .from(competitionsTable)
491	        .where(eq(competitionsTable.id, params.competitionId))
492	
493	      laneShiftPattern =
494	        (competition?.defaultLaneShiftPattern as LaneShiftPattern) ??
495	        LANE_SHIFT_PATTERN.STAY
496	    }
497	
498	    // Final fallback
499	    if (!laneShiftPattern) {
500	      laneShiftPattern = LANE_SHIFT_PATTERN.STAY
501	    }
502	  }
503	
504	  // Generate ID first
505	  const { createJudgeRotationId } = await import("@/db/schemas/common")
506	  const id = createJudgeRotationId()
507	
508	  // Insert without returning
509	  await db.insert(competitionJudgeRotationsTable).values({
510	    id,
511	    competitionId: params.competitionId,
512	    trackWorkoutId: params.trackWorkoutId,
513	    membershipId: params.membershipId,
514	    startingHeat: params.startingHeat,
515	    startingLane: params.startingLane,
516	    heatsCount: params.heatsCount,
517	    laneShiftPattern,
518	    notes: params.notes ?? null,
519	  })
520	
521	  // Select back
522	  const rotation = await db.query.competitionJudgeRotationsTable.findFirst({
523	    where: eq(competitionJudgeRotationsTable.id, id),
524	  })
525	
526	  if (!rotation) {
527	    throw new Error("Failed to create judge rotation")
528	  }
529	
530	  return rotation
531	}
532	
533	/**
534	 * Delete a judge rotation (internal helper)
535	 *
536	 * Note: The rotationId FK on judge_heat_assignments was created without
537	 * ON DELETE SET NULL (migration 0060), so we must manually null it out
538	 * before deleting the rotation to avoid FK constraint violations.
539	 */
540	async function deleteRotationInternal(
541	  rotationId: string,
542	  teamId: string,
543	): Promise<void> {
544	  const db = getDb()
545	
546	  // Permission check
547	  await requireTeamPermission(teamId, TEAM_PERMISSIONS.MANAGE_COMPETITIONS)
548	
549	  // Clear rotationId references in judge_heat_assignments before deleting
550	  // (the DB FK lacks ON DELETE SET NULL due to migration 0060)
551	  await db
552	    .update(judgeHeatAssignmentsTable)
553	    .set({ rotationId: null })
554	    .where(eq(judgeHeatAssignmentsTable.rotationId, rotationId))
555	
556	  await db
557	    .delete(competitionJudgeRotationsTable)
558	    .where(eq(competitionJudgeRotationsTable.id, rotationId))
559	}

565	/**
566	 * Get all rotations for an event with defaults
567	 */
568	export const getEventRotationsFn = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
569	  .inputValidator((data: unknown) => getEventRotationsSchema.parse(data))
570	  .handler(async ({ data }) => {
571	    const db = getDb()
572

633	/**
634	 * Get enriched rotations for a judge with trackWorkout, workout, and heats data
635	 */
636	export const getEnrichedJudgeRotationsFn = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
637	  .inputValidator((data: unknown) =>
638	    getEnrichedJudgeRotationsSchema.parse(data),
639	  )
640	  .handler(async ({ data }): Promise<EnrichedJudgeRotation[]> => {
641	    const db = getDb()
642	
643	    // Get raw rotations first
644	    const rotations = await db
645	      .select()
646	      .from(competitionJudgeRotationsTable)
647	      .where(
648	        and(
649	          eq(competitionJudgeRotationsTable.membershipId, data.membershipId),
650	          eq(competitionJudgeRotationsTable.competitionId, data.competitionId),
651	        ),
652	      )
653	
654	    const enriched: EnrichedJudgeRotation[] = []
655	
656	    for (const rotation of rotations) {
657	      const diagnostics = {
658	        missingTrackWorkout: false,
659	        missingWorkout: false,
660	        missingHeats: false,
661	        heatsWithoutSchedule: 0,
662	      }
663	
664	      // Fetch trackWorkout
665	      const [trackWorkout] = await db
666	        .select()
667	        .from(trackWorkoutsTable)
668	        .where(eq(trackWorkoutsTable.id, rotation.trackWorkoutId))
669	
670	      if (!trackWorkout) {
671	        console.error(
672	          `[getEnrichedJudgeRotationsFn] Missing trackWorkout for rotation ${rotation.id}, trackWorkoutId=${rotation.trackWorkoutId}`,
673	        )
674	        diagnostics.missingTrackWorkout = true
675	      }
676	
677	      // Skip if filtering unpublished and event is not published
678	      if (
679	        !data.includeUnpublished &&
680	        trackWorkout?.eventStatus !== "published"
681	      ) {
682	        console.log(
683	          `[getEnrichedJudgeRotationsFn] Skipping rotation ${rotation.id} - eventStatus=${trackWorkout?.eventStatus} (not published)`,
684	        )
685	        continue
686	      }
687	
688	      // Fetch workout if trackWorkout exists
689	      let workout: { id: string; name: string } | null = null
690	      if (trackWorkout?.workoutId) {
691	        const [workoutResult] = await db
692	          .select({ id: workouts.id, name: workouts.name })
693	          .from(workouts)
694	          .where(eq(workouts.id, trackWorkout.workoutId))
695	
696	        if (!workoutResult) {
697	          console.error(
698	            `[getEnrichedJudgeRotationsFn] Missing workout for rotation ${rotation.id}, workoutId=${trackWorkout.workoutId}`,
699	          )
700	          diagnostics.missingWorkout = true
701	        } else {
702	          workout = workoutResult
703	        }
704	      } else if (trackWorkout) {
705	        console.error(
706	          `[getEnrichedJudgeRotationsFn] TrackWorkout ${trackWorkout.id} has no workoutId`,
707	        )
708	        diagnostics.missingWorkout = true
709	      }
710	
711	      // Fetch heats for this trackWorkout
712	      const heats = trackWorkout
713	        ? await db
714	            .select({
715	              heatNumber: competitionHeatsTable.heatNumber,
716	              scheduledTime: competitionHeatsTable.scheduledTime,
717	              durationMinutes: competitionHeatsTable.durationMinutes,
718	            })
719	            .from(competitionHeatsTable)
720	            .where(
721	              eq(competitionHeatsTable.trackWorkoutId, rotation.trackWorkoutId),
722	            )
723	        : []
724	
725	      if (heats.length === 0) {
726	        console.error(
727	          `[getEnrichedJudgeRotationsFn] No heats found for rotation ${rotation.id}, trackWorkoutId=${rotation.trackWorkoutId}`,
728	        )
729	        diagnostics.missingHeats = true
730	      } else {
731	        // Check for heats missing schedule data
732	        const unscheduled = heats.filter(
733	          (h) => !h.scheduledTime || !h.durationMinutes,
734	        )
735	        if (unscheduled.length > 0) {
736	          console.warn(
737	            `[getEnrichedJudgeRotationsFn] ${unscheduled.length}/${heats.length} heats for rotation ${rotation.id} lack scheduledTime or durationMinutes`,
738	          )
739	          diagnostics.heatsWithoutSchedule = unscheduled.length
740	        }
741	      }
742	
743	      enriched.push({
744	        rotation,
745	        trackWorkout: trackWorkout ?? null,
746	        workout,
747	        heats,
748	        diagnostics,
749	      })
750	    }
751	
752	    // Summary logging
753	    const withIssues = enriched.filter(
754	      (r) =>
755	        r.diagnostics.missingTrackWorkout ||
756	        r.diagnostics.missingWorkout ||
757	        r.diagnostics.missingHeats ||
758	        r.diagnostics.heatsWithoutSchedule > 0,
759	    )
760	
761	    if (withIssues.length > 0) {
762	      console.warn(
763	        `[getEnrichedJudgeRotationsFn] ${withIssues.length}/${enriched.length} rotation(s) have data issues`,
764	      )
765	    }
766	
767	    return enriched
768	  })

819	/**
820	 * Update an existing judge rotation
821	 */
822	export const updateJudgeRotationFn = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
823	  .inputValidator((data: unknown) => updateRotationSchema.parse(data))
824	  .handler(async ({ data }) => {
825	    const db = getDb()
826	
827	    // Permission check
828	    await requireTeamPermission(
829	      data.teamId,
830	      TEAM_PERMISSIONS.MANAGE_COMPETITIONS,
831	    )
832	
833	    // Get existing rotation to merge data for validation
834	    const existing = await db.query.competitionJudgeRotationsTable.findFirst({
835	      where: (table, { eq }) => eq(table.id, data.rotationId),
836	    })
837	
838	    if (!existing) {
839	      throw new Error("Rotation not found")
840	    }
841	
842	    // Validate with merged data
843	    const validation = await validateRotationConflictsInternal({
844	      id: data.rotationId,
845	      trackWorkoutId: existing.trackWorkoutId,
846	      membershipId: existing.membershipId,
847	      startingHeat: data.startingHeat ?? existing.startingHeat,
848	      startingLane: data.startingLane ?? existing.startingLane,
849	      heatsCount: data.heatsCount ?? existing.heatsCount,
850	      laneShiftPattern: data.laneShiftPattern ?? existing.laneShiftPattern,
851	    })
852	
853	    if (validation.conflicts.length > 0) {
854	      throw new Error(
855	        `Rotation has conflicts: ${validation.conflicts.map((c) => c.message).join(", ")}`,
856	      )
857	    }
858	
859	    const updateData: Partial<CompetitionJudgeRotation> = {
860	      updatedAt: new Date(),
861	    }
862	
863	    if (data.startingHeat !== undefined) {
864	      updateData.startingHeat = data.startingHeat
865	    }
866	    if (data.startingLane !== undefined) {
867	      updateData.startingLane = data.startingLane
868	    }
869	    if (data.heatsCount !== undefined) {
870	      updateData.heatsCount = data.heatsCount
871	    }
872	    if (data.laneShiftPattern !== undefined) {
873	      updateData.laneShiftPattern = data.laneShiftPattern
874	    }
875	    if (data.notes !== undefined) {
876	      updateData.notes = data.notes
877	    }
878	
879	    // Update without returning
880	    await db
881	      .update(competitionJudgeRotationsTable)
882	      .set(updateData)
883	      .where(eq(competitionJudgeRotationsTable.id, data.rotationId))
884	
885	    // Select back
886	    const updated = await db.query.competitionJudgeRotationsTable.findFirst({
887	      where: eq(competitionJudgeRotationsTable.id, data.rotationId),
888	    })
889	
890	    if (!updated) {
891	      throw new Error("Rotation not found or update failed")
892	    }
893	
894	    return { success: true, data: updated }
895	  })

948	/**
949	 * Batch create multiple rotations for the same volunteer
950	 * Validates ALL rotations before creating any (fail-fast)
951	 */
952	export const batchCreateRotationsFn = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
953	  .inputValidator((data: unknown) => batchCreateRotationsSchema.parse(data))
954	  .handler(async ({ data }) => {
955	    const db = getDb()
956	
957	    // Validate that all foreign keys exist
958	    const [trackWorkout, membership, competition] = await Promise.all([
959	      db.query.trackWorkoutsTable.findFirst({
960	        where: (table, { eq }) => eq(table.id, data.trackWorkoutId),
961	      }),
962	      db.query.teamMembershipTable.findFirst({
963	        where: (table, { eq }) => eq(table.id, data.membershipId),
964	      }),
965	      db.query.competitionsTable.findFirst({
966	        where: (table, { eq }) => eq(table.id, data.competitionId),
967	      }),
968	    ])
969	
970	    if (!trackWorkout) {
971	      throw new Error("Event not found")
972	    }
973	    if (!membership) {
974	      throw new Error("Judge membership not found")
975	    }
976	    if (!competition) {
977	      throw new Error("Competition not found")
978	    }
979	
980	    // Validate all rotations first (fail-fast)
981	    const validationPromises = data.rotations.map((rotation) =>
982	      validateRotationConflictsInternal({
983	        trackWorkoutId: data.trackWorkoutId,
984	        membershipId: data.membershipId,
985	        startingHeat: rotation.startingHeat,
986	        startingLane: rotation.startingLane,
987	        heatsCount: rotation.heatsCount,
988	        laneShiftPattern: data.laneShiftPattern,
989	      }),
990	    )
991	
992	    const validationResults = await Promise.all(validationPromises)
993	
994	    // Collect all conflicts
995	    const allConflicts = validationResults.flatMap((result) => result.conflicts)
996	
997	    if (allConflicts.length > 0) {
998	      throw new Error(
999	        `Rotations have conflicts: ${allConflicts.map((c) => c.message).join(", ")}`,
1000	      )
1001	    }
1002	
1003	    // Check for conflicts BETWEEN the new rotations being created
1004	    for (let i = 0; i < data.rotations.length; i++) {
1005	      for (let j = i + 1; j < data.rotations.length; j++) {
1006	        const rot1 = data.rotations[i]
1007	        const rot2 = data.rotations[j]
1008	
1009	        if (!rot1 || !rot2) continue
1010	
1011	        // Check if heat ranges overlap
1012	        const rot1End = rot1.startingHeat + rot1.heatsCount - 1
1013	        const rot2End = rot2.startingHeat + rot2.heatsCount - 1
1014	
1015	        if (!(rot1End < rot2.startingHeat || rot2End < rot1.startingHeat)) {
1016	          throw new Error(
1017	            `Rotations ${i + 1} and ${j + 1} have overlapping heat ranges and may conflict`,
1018	          )
1019	        }
1020	      }
1021	    }
1022	
1023	    // All validations passed - create rotations in sequence
1024	    const createdRotations: CompetitionJudgeRotation[] = []
1025	
1026	    for (const rotation of data.rotations) {
1027	      const created = await createRotationInternal({
1028	        teamId: data.teamId,
1029	        competitionId: data.competitionId,
1030	        trackWorkoutId: data.trackWorkoutId,
1031	        membershipId: data.membershipId,
1032	        startingHeat: rotation.startingHeat,
1033	        startingLane: rotation.startingLane,
1034	        heatsCount: rotation.heatsCount,
1035	        laneShiftPattern: data.laneShiftPattern,
1036	        notes: rotation.notes,
1037	      })
1038	
1039	      createdRotations.push(created)
1040	    }
1041	
1042	    return {
1043	      success: true,
1044	      data: {
1045	        rotationIds: createdRotations.map((r) => r.id),
1046	        rotations: createdRotations,
1047	      },
1048	    }
1049	  })

1051	/**
1052	 * Replace all rotations for a volunteer with a new set
1053	 * Deletes existing rotations, then creates new ones
1054	 */
1055	export const batchUpdateVolunteerRotationsFn = createServerFn({
1056	  method: "POST",
1057	})
1058	  .inputValidator((data: unknown) =>
1059	    batchUpdateVolunteerRotationsSchema.parse(data),
1060	  )
1061	  .handler(async ({ data }) => {
1062	    const db = getDb()
1063	
1064	    // Validate that all foreign keys exist
1065	    const [trackWorkout, membership, competition] = await Promise.all([
1066	      db.query.trackWorkoutsTable.findFirst({
1067	        where: (table, { eq }) => eq(table.id, data.trackWorkoutId),
1068	      }),
1069	      db.query.teamMembershipTable.findFirst({
1070	        where: (table, { eq }) => eq(table.id, data.membershipId),
1071	      }),
1072	      db.query.competitionsTable.findFirst({
1073	        where: (table, { eq }) => eq(table.id, data.competitionId),
1074	      }),
1075	    ])
1076	
1077	    if (!trackWorkout) {
1078	      throw new Error("Event not found")
1079	    }
1080	    if (!membership) {
1081	      throw new Error("Judge membership not found")
1082	    }
1083	    if (!competition) {
1084	      throw new Error("Competition not found")
1085	    }
1086	
1087	    // Validate all NEW rotations first (fail-fast)
1088	    // Pass excludeAllForMembership: true because we're replacing ALL rotations
1089	    const validationPromises = data.rotations.map((rotation) =>
1090	      validateRotationConflictsInternal(
1091	        {
1092	          trackWorkoutId: data.trackWorkoutId,
1093	          membershipId: data.membershipId,
1094	          startingHeat: rotation.startingHeat,
1095	          startingLane: rotation.startingLane,
1096	          heatsCount: rotation.heatsCount,
1097	          laneShiftPattern: data.laneShiftPattern,
1098	        },
1099	        { excludeAllForMembership: true },
1100	      ),
1101	    )
1102	
1103	    const validationResults = await Promise.all(validationPromises)
1104	
1105	    // Check for conflicts BETWEEN the new rotations being created
1106	    for (let i = 0; i < data.rotations.length; i++) {
1107	      for (let j = i + 1; j < data.rotations.length; j++) {
1108	        const rot1 = data.rotations[i]
1109	        const rot2 = data.rotations[j]
1110	
1111	        if (!rot1 || !rot2) continue
1112

1115	        const rot2End = rot2.startingHeat + rot2.heatsCount - 1
1116	
1117	        if (!(rot1End < rot2.startingHeat || rot2End < rot1.startingHeat)) {
1118	          throw new Error(
1119	            `Rotations ${i + 1} and ${j + 1} have overlapping heat ranges and may conflict`,
1120	          )
1121	        }
1122	      }
1123	    }
1124	
1125	    // Collect validation errors
1126	    const allConflicts = validationResults.flatMap((result) => result.conflicts)
1127	
1128	    if (allConflicts.length > 0) {
1129	      throw new Error(
1130	        `Rotations have conflicts: ${allConflicts.map((c) => c.message).join(", ")}`,
1131	      )
1132	    }
1133	
1134	    // Delete existing rotations for this volunteer+event using batch operations
1135	    const existingRotations = await db
1136	      .select({ id: competitionJudgeRotationsTable.id })
1137	      .from(competitionJudgeRotationsTable)
1138	      .where(
1139	        and(
1140	          eq(
1141	            competitionJudgeRotationsTable.trackWorkoutId,
1142	            data.trackWorkoutId,
1143	          ),
1144	          eq(competitionJudgeRotationsTable.membershipId, data.membershipId),
1145	        ),
1146	      )
1147	
1148	    if (existingRotations.length > 0) {
1149	      const existingIds = existingRotations.map((r) => r.id)
1150	      await db.transaction(async (tx) => {
1151	        await tx
1152	          .update(judgeHeatAssignmentsTable)
1153	          .set({ rotationId: null })
1154	          .where(inArray(judgeHeatAssignmentsTable.rotationId, existingIds))
1155	
1156	        await tx
1157	          .delete(competitionJudgeRotationsTable)
1158	          .where(inArray(competitionJudgeRotationsTable.id, existingIds))
1159	      })
1160	    }
1161	
1162	    // Create new rotations in sequence
1163	    const createdRotations: CompetitionJudgeRotation[] = []
1164	
1165	    for (const rotation of data.rotations) {
1166	      const created = await createRotationInternal({
1167	        teamId: data.teamId,
1168	        competitionId: data.competitionId,
1169	        trackWorkoutId: data.trackWorkoutId,
1170	        membershipId: data.membershipId,
1171	        startingHeat: rotation.startingHeat,
1172	        startingLane: rotation.startingLane,
1173	        heatsCount: rotation.heatsCount,
1174	        laneShiftPattern: data.laneShiftPattern,
1175	        notes: rotation.notes,
1176	      })
1177	
1178	      createdRotations.push(created)
1179	    }
1180	
1181	    return {
1182	      success: true,
1183	      data: {
1184	        rotationIds: createdRotations.map((r) => r.id),
1185	        rotations: createdRotations,
1186	      },
1187	    }
1188	  })

1193	export const deleteVolunteerRotationsFn = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })

1196	    const db = getDb()
1197	
1198	    // Permission check

1203

1220

1228	        await tx
1229	          .delete(competitionJudgeRotationsTable)
1230	          .where(inArray(competitionJudgeRotationsTable.id, rotationIds))
1231	      })
1232	    }
1233	
1234	    return {
1235	      success: true,
1236	      data: { deletedCount: rotationsToDelete.length },
1237	    }
1238	  })
1239	
1240	/**
1241	 * Batch delete multiple rotations by their IDs
1242	 */
1243	export const batchDeleteRotationsFn = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
1244	  .inputValidator((data: unknown) => batchDeleteRotationsSchema.parse(data))
1245	  .handler(async ({ data }) => {
1246	    const db = getDb()
1247	
1248	    // Permission check
1249	    await requireTeamPermission(
1250	      data.teamId,
1251	      TEAM_PERMISSIONS.MANAGE_COMPETITIONS,
1252	    )
1253	
1254	    // Verify all rotations belong to this competition before deleting
1255	    const rotations = await db.query.competitionJudgeRotationsTable.findMany({
1256	      where: (table, { inArray }) => inArray(table.id, data.rotationIds),
1257	    })
1258	
1259	    for (const rotation of rotations) {
1260	      if (rotation.competitionId !== data.competitionId) {
1261	        throw new Error("Rotation does not belong to this competition")
1262	      }
1263	    }
1264	
1265	    // Batch clear FK references and delete in a transaction
1266	    await db.transaction(async (tx) => {
1267	      await tx
1268	        .update(judgeHeatAssignmentsTable)
1269	        .set({ rotationId: null })
1270	        .where(inArray(judgeHeatAssignmentsTable.rotationId, data.rotationIds))
1271	
1272	      await tx
1273	        .delete(competitionJudgeRotationsTable)
1274	        .where(inArray(competitionJudgeRotationsTable.id, data.rotationIds))
1275	    })
1276	
1277	    return {
1278	      success: true,
1279	      data: { deletedCount: data.rotationIds.length },
1280	    }
1281	  })
1282	
1283	/**
1284	 * Adjust rotations to only cover lanes with athletes.
1285	 * Splits rotations as needed to skip unoccupied lanes.
1286	 */
1287	export const adjustRotationsForOccupiedLanesFn = createServerFn({
1288	  method: "POST",
1289	})
1290	  .inputValidator((data: unknown) =>
1291	    adjustRotationsForOccupiedLanesSchema.parse(data),
1292	  )
1293	  .handler(async ({ data }) => {
1294	    const db = getDb()
1295	
1296	    // Permission check
1297	    await requireTeamPermission(
1298	      data.teamId,
1299	      TEAM_PERMISSIONS.MANAGE_COMPETITIONS,
1300	    )
1301	
1302	    // Get heats for expansion
1303	    const heatsRaw = await db
1304	      .select({
1305	        heatNumber: competitionHeatsTable.heatNumber,
1306	        venueLaneCount: competitionVenuesTable.laneCount,
1307	      })
1308	      .from(competitionHeatsTable)
1309	      .leftJoin(
1310	        competitionVenuesTable,
1311	        eq(competitionHeatsTable.venueId, competitionVenuesTable.id),
1312	      )
1313	      .where(eq(competitionHeatsTable.trackWorkoutId, data.trackWorkoutId))
1314	
1315	    const heats = heatsRaw.map((h) => ({
1316	      heatNumber: h.heatNumber,
1317	      laneCount: h.venueLaneCount ?? 10,
1318	    }))
1319	
1320	    // Convert occupiedLanesByHeat to a Map for easier lookup
1321	    const occupiedMap = new Map<number, Set<number>>()
1322	    for (const [heatStr, lanes] of Object.entries(data.occupiedLanesByHeat)) {
1323	      occupiedMap.set(Number(heatStr), new Set(lanes))
1324	    }
1325	
1326	    let deletedCount = 0
1327	    let createdCount = 0
1328	    let unchangedCount = 0
1329	
1330	    for (const rotationId of data.rotationIds) {
1331	      // Get the rotation
1332	      const rotation = await db.query.competitionJudgeRotationsTable.findFirst({
1333	        where: (table, { eq }) => eq(table.id, rotationId),
1334	      })
1335	
1336	      if (!rotation) continue
1337	
1338	      // Validate rotation belongs to this event
1339	      if (
1340	        rotation.trackWorkoutId !== data.trackWorkoutId ||
1341	        rotation.competitionId !== data.competitionId
1342	      ) {
1343	        throw new Error("Rotation does not belong to this event")
1344	      }
1345	
1346	      // Expand to assignments
1347	      const assignments = expandRotationToAssignments(rotation, heats)
1348	
1349	      // Filter to only occupied lanes
1350	      const occupiedAssignments = assignments.filter((a) => {
1351	        const occupied = occupiedMap.get(a.heatNumber)
1352	        return occupied?.has(a.laneNumber)
1353	      })
1354	
1355	      // If all assignments are valid, skip this rotation
1356	      if (occupiedAssignments.length === assignments.length) {
1357	        unchangedCount++
1358	        continue
1359	      }
1360	
1361	      // If no assignments are valid, just delete
1362	      if (occupiedAssignments.length === 0) {
1363	        await deleteRotationInternal(rotationId, data.teamId)
1364	        deletedCount++
1365	        continue
1366	      }
1367	
1368	      // Group contiguous heats into new rotations
1369	      // Sort by heat number
1370	      occupiedAssignments.sort((a, b) => a.heatNumber - b.heatNumber)
1371	
1372	      const newRotations: Array<{
1373	        startingHeat: number
1374	        startingLane: number
1375	        heatsCount: number
1376	      }> = []
1377	
1378	      let currentRun: typeof occupiedAssignments = []
1379	
1380	      for (const assignment of occupiedAssignments) {
1381	        if (currentRun.length === 0) {
1382	          currentRun.push(assignment)
1383	        } else {
1384	          const lastAssignment = currentRun[currentRun.length - 1]!
1385	          // Check if this is contiguous (next heat in sequence)
1386	          if (assignment.heatNumber === lastAssignment.heatNumber + 1) {
1387	            currentRun.push(assignment)
1388	          } else {
1389	            // End current run, start new one
1390	            newRotations.push({
1391	              startingHeat: currentRun[0]?.heatNumber,
1392	              startingLane: currentRun[0]?.laneNumber,
1393	              heatsCount: currentRun.length,
1394	            })
1395	            currentRun = [assignment]
1396	          }
1397	        }
1398	      }
1399	
1400	      // Don't forget the last run
1401	      if (currentRun.length > 0) {
1402	        newRotations.push({
1403	          startingHeat: currentRun[0]?.heatNumber,
1404	          startingLane: currentRun[0]?.laneNumber,
1405	          heatsCount: currentRun.length,
1406	        })
1407	      }
1408	
1409	      // Create new rotations FIRST to avoid data loss if creation fails
1410	      // Build replacements before deleting
1411	      for (const newRot of newRotations) {
1412	        await createRotationInternal({
1413	          teamId: data.teamId,
1414	          competitionId: data.competitionId,
1415	          trackWorkoutId: data.trackWorkoutId,
1416	          membershipId: rotation.membershipId,
1417	          startingHeat: newRot.startingHeat,
1418	          startingLane: newRot.startingLane,
1419	          heatsCount: newRot.heatsCount,
1420	          laneShiftPattern: rotation.laneShiftPattern,
1421	          notes: rotation.notes ?? undefined,
1422	        })
1423	        createdCount++
1424	      }
1425	
1426	      // Delete old rotation only after new ones are created successfully
1427	      await deleteRotationInternal(rotationId, data.teamId)
1428	      deletedCount++
1429	    }
1430	
1431	    return {
1432	      success: true,
1433	      data: { deletedCount, createdCount, unchangedCount },
1434	    }
1435	  })
1436

230	export async function saveCrewJudgeRotationsForVolunteer(
231	  data: SaveCrewJudgeRotationsInput,
232	) {
233	  const db = getDb()
234	  const event = await requireCrewJudgeEvent(data.eventId)
235	  await requireCrewEventManagerAccess(event, "Crew judge rotations")
236	  await requireCrewJudgeWorkout(event.id, data.trackWorkoutId)
237	  await requireCrewJudgeAssignee(event.competitionTeamId, data.membershipId)
238	  const assigneeColumns = toJudgeAssigneeColumns(data.membershipId)
239	
240	  const normalizedRotations = data.rotations.map((rotation) => ({
241	    membershipId: data.membershipId,
242	    startingHeat: rotation.startingHeat,
243	    startingLane: rotation.startingLane,
244	    heatsCount: rotation.heatsCount,
245	    laneShiftPattern: data.laneShiftPattern,
246	    notes: normalizeOptionalText(rotation.notes),
247	  }))
248	
249	  if (normalizedRotations.length > 0) {
250	    const heats = (await loadCrewJudgeHeats(event.id)).filter(
251	      (heat) => heat.trackWorkoutId === data.trackWorkoutId,
252	    )
253	    const otherRotations = await db
254	      .select()
255	      .from(competitionJudgeRotationsTable)
256	      .where(
257	        eq(competitionJudgeRotationsTable.trackWorkoutId, data.trackWorkoutId),
258	      )
259	    const occupiedSlots = expandCrewJudgeRotationDrafts({
260	      heats,
261	      // Treat every other judge's rotation as occupied; exclude this judge's own
262	      // rows (matched by canonical assignee id) so re-saving doesn't self-block.
263	      rotations: otherRotations
264	        .filter(
265	          (rotation) =>
266	            getRotationAssigneeId(rotation) !== data.membershipId,
267	        )
268	        .map(toCrewJudgeRotationDraft),
269	    })
270	    const issues = validateCrewJudgeRotationDrafts({
271	      heats,
272	      occupiedSlots,
273	      rotations: normalizedRotations.map((rotation) => ({
274	        membershipId: rotation.membershipId,
275	        startingHeat: rotation.startingHeat,
276	        startingLane: rotation.startingLane,
277	        heatsCount: rotation.heatsCount,
278	        laneShiftPattern: rotation.laneShiftPattern,
279	      })),
280	    })
281	
282	    if (hasCrewJudgeRotationErrors(issues)) {
283	      throw new Error(
284	        issues
285	          .filter((issue) => issue.severity === "error")
286	          .map((issue) => issue.message)
287	          .join(" "),
288	      )
289	    }
290	  }
291	
292	  await db.transaction(async (tx) => {
293	    const existingRotations = await tx
294	      .select({ id: competitionJudgeRotationsTable.id })
295	      .from(competitionJudgeRotationsTable)
296	      .where(
297	        and(
298	          eq(
299	            competitionJudgeRotationsTable.trackWorkoutId,
300	            data.trackWorkoutId,
301	          ),
302	          assigneeColumns.invitationId
303	            ? eq(
304	                competitionJudgeRotationsTable.invitationId,
305	                assigneeColumns.invitationId,
306	              )
307	            : eq(
308	                competitionJudgeRotationsTable.membershipId,
309	                assigneeColumns.membershipId ?? "",
310	              ),
311	        ),
312	      )
313	
314	    const existingRotationIds = existingRotations.map((rotation) => rotation.id)
315	    if (existingRotationIds.length > 0) {
316	      const assignmentReferences = await tx
317	        .select({ id: judgeHeatAssignmentsTable.id })
318	        .from(judgeHeatAssignmentsTable)
319	        .where(
320	          inArray(judgeHeatAssignmentsTable.rotationId, existingRotationIds),
321	        )
322	        .limit(1)
323	
324	      assertCrewJudgeRotationReplacementAllowed({
325	        assignmentReferenceCount: assignmentReferences.length,
326	      })
327	
328	      await tx
329	        .delete(competitionJudgeRotationsTable)
330	        .where(inArray(competitionJudgeRotationsTable.id, existingRotationIds))
331	    }
332	
333	    if (normalizedRotations.length > 0) {
334	      await tx.insert(competitionJudgeRotationsTable).values(
335	        normalizedRotations.map((rotation) => ({
336	          id: createJudgeRotationId(),
337	          competitionId: event.id,
338	          trackWorkoutId: data.trackWorkoutId,
339	          membershipId: assigneeColumns.membershipId,
340	          invitationId: assigneeColumns.invitationId,
341	          startingHeat: rotation.startingHeat,
342	          startingLane: rotation.startingLane,
343	          heatsCount: rotation.heatsCount,
344	          laneShiftPattern: rotation.laneShiftPattern,
345	          notes: rotation.notes,
346	        })),
347	      )
348	    }
349	  })
350	
351	  return {
352	    success: true,
353	    rotations: await loadCrewJudgeRotations([data.trackWorkoutId]),
354	  }
355	}

366	  const version = await publishMaterializedJudgeAssignmentsVersion(

379	async function requireCrewJudgeEvent(eventId: string): Promise<CrewJudgeEvent> {

381	  const [event] = await db
382	    .select({
383	      id: competitionsTable.id,
384	      name: competitionsTable.name,
385	      slug: competitionsTable.slug,
386	      organizingTeamId: competitionsTable.organizingTeamId,
387	      competitionTeamId: competitionsTable.competitionTeamId,
388	      startDate: competitionsTable.startDate,

391	      competitionType: competitionsTable.competitionType,
392	    })
393	    .from(crewEventSettingsTable)
394	    .innerJoin(
395	      competitionsTable,
396	      eq(crewEventSettingsTable.competitionId, competitionsTable.id),
397	    )
398	    .where(eq(crewEventSettingsTable.competitionId, eventId))
399	    .limit(1)
400	
401	  if (!event) {
402	    throw new Error("Crew event not found")
403	  }
404	
405	  if (!event.competitionTeamId) {
406	    throw new Error("Crew event does not have a competition team")
407	  }

411	    competitionTeamId: event.competitionTeamId,
412	  }

415	async function requireCrewJudgeWorkout(

417	  trackWorkoutId: string,
418	) {

440	/**
441	 * Validate that a canonical assignee id (membership tmem_ or invitation tinv_)
442	 * resolves to a judge-eligible, staffable volunteer on this event's competition
443	 * team. Resolves against the same roster the grid is built from so invitation-
444	 * based (imported / manual) judges are accepted just like membership-based ones.
445	 */
446	async function requireCrewJudgeAssignee(
447	  competitionTeamId: string,
448	  assigneeId: string,
449	) {
450	  const judges = await loadCrewJudgeVolunteers(competitionTeamId)
451	  const judge = judges.find((volunteer) => volunteer.membershipId === assigneeId)
452	
453	  if (!judge) {
454	    throw new Error("Selected volunteer is not an eligible judge")
455	  }
456	}
457	
458	async function loadCrewJudgeWorkouts(
459	  eventId: string,
460	): Promise<CrewJudgeWorkout[]> {
461	  const db = getDb()
462	  const rows = await db
463	    .select({
464	      id: trackWorkoutsTable.id,
465	      trackOrder: trackWorkoutsTable.trackOrder,
466	      eventStatus: trackWorkoutsTable.eventStatus,
467	      heatStatus: trackWorkoutsTable.heatStatus,
468	      defaultHeatsCount: trackWorkoutsTable.defaultHeatsCount,
469	      defaultLaneShiftPattern: trackWorkoutsTable.defaultLaneShiftPattern,
470	      minHeatBuffer: trackWorkoutsTable.minHeatBuffer,
471	      workoutId: workouts.id,
472	      workoutName: workouts.name,
473	    })
474	    .from(trackWorkoutsTable)
475	    .innerJoin(
476	      programmingTracksTable,
477	      eq(trackWorkoutsTable.trackId, programmingTracksTable.id),
478	    )
479	    .innerJoin(workouts, eq(trackWorkoutsTable.workoutId, workouts.id))
480	    .where(eq(programmingTracksTable.competitionId, eventId))
481	    .orderBy(asc(trackWorkoutsTable.trackOrder))
482	
483	  return rows.map((row) => ({
484	    id: row.id,
485	    trackOrder: row.trackOrder,
486	    eventStatus: row.eventStatus,
487	    heatStatus: row.heatStatus,
488	    defaultHeatsCount: row.defaultHeatsCount,
489	    defaultLaneShiftPattern: row.defaultLaneShiftPattern as LaneShiftPattern,
490	    minHeatBuffer: row.minHeatBuffer,
491	    workout: {
492	      id: row.workoutId,
493	      name: row.workoutName,
494	    },
495	  }))
496	}

498	async function loadCrewJudgeHeats(eventId: string): Promise<CrewJudgeHeat[]> {
499	  const db = getDb()
500	  const heatRows = await db
501	    .select({
502	      id: competitionHeatsTable.id,
503	      trackWorkoutId: competitionHeatsTable.trackWorkoutId,
504	      heatNumber: competitionHeatsTable.heatNumber,
505	      scheduledTime: competitionHeatsTable.scheduledTime,
506	      durationMinutes: competitionHeatsTable.durationMinutes,

508	      venueLaneCount: competitionVenuesTable.laneCount,

510	    .from(competitionHeatsTable)
511	    .leftJoin(

513	      eq(competitionHeatsTable.venueId, competitionVenuesTable.id),
514	    )
515	    .where(eq(competitionHeatsTable.competitionId, eventId))
516	    .orderBy(
517	      asc(competitionHeatsTable.trackWorkoutId),
518	      asc(competitionHeatsTable.heatNumber),
519	    )
520	
521	  const heatAssignmentRows = await loadCrewJudgeHeatLaneAssignments(
522	    db,
523	    heatRows.map((heat) => heat.id),
524	  )
525	
526	  return toCrewJudgeHeats(heatRows, heatAssignmentRows)
527	}

529	/**
530	 * Load the judge roster for an event's competition team. Built from the same
531	 * union of team memberships AND team invitations the shift roster uses, so
532	 * imported / manually-added volunteers (stored as invitations, often without a
533	 * user account) appear alongside account-backed volunteers. Filtered to
534	 * judge-eligible role types (judge / head_judge / general — see
535	 * {@link isCrewJudgeEligible}) and to staffable statuses, then mapped to the
536	 * grid-facing shape keyed by a canonical assignee id.
537	 */
538	async function loadCrewJudgeVolunteers(
539	  competitionTeamId: string,
540	): Promise<CrewJudgeVolunteer[]> {
541	  const roster = await loadCrewRoster(competitionTeamId)
542	
543	  return roster
544	    .filter(
545	      (volunteer) =>
546	        isCrewRosterVolunteerStaffable(volunteer) &&
547	        isCrewJudgeEligible(volunteer.roleTypes),
548	    )
549	    .map(toCrewJudgeVolunteer)
550	    .filter((volunteer): volunteer is CrewJudgeVolunteer => volunteer !== null)
551	    .sort((a, b) => getJudgeName(a).localeCompare(getJudgeName(b)))
552	}
553	
554	/**
555	 * Map a roster volunteer to the grid-facing judge shape. The canonical assignee
556	 * id (membership id for account-backed, invitation id for imported / manual
557	 * volunteers) is stored in `membershipId` so the grid keeps keying judges off
558	 * `membershipId` unchanged. Returns null if the volunteer has no usable id.
559	 */
560	function toCrewJudgeVolunteer(
561	  volunteer: CrewRosterVolunteer,
562	): CrewJudgeVolunteer | null {
563	  const assigneeId = getCrewRosterAssigneeId(volunteer)
564	  if (!assigneeId) return null
565	
566	  return {
567	    membershipId: assigneeId,
568	    source: volunteer.source,
569	    sourceId: volunteer.sourceId,
570	    invitationId: volunteer.invitationId,
571	    userId: null,
572	    // The roster collapses first/last name into a single display name; carry it
573	    // in firstName so getJudgeName / getCrewJudgeName render it unchanged.
574	    firstName: volunteer.name || null,
575	    lastName: null,
576	    email: volunteer.email || null,
577	    avatar: null,
578	    volunteerRoleTypes: volunteer.roleTypes,
579	    credentials: volunteer.credentials ?? undefined,
580	    availability: volunteer.availability ?? undefined,
581	    availabilityNotes: volunteer.availabilityNotes ?? undefined,
582	  }
583	}
584	
585	async function loadCrewJudgeRotations(trackWorkoutIds: string[]) {
586	  if (trackWorkoutIds.length === 0) return []
587	
588	  const db = getDb()
589	  return db.query.competitionJudgeRotationsTable.findMany({
590	    where: inArray(
591	      competitionJudgeRotationsTable.trackWorkoutId,
592	      trackWorkoutIds,
593	    ),
594	    orderBy: [
595	      asc(competitionJudgeRotationsTable.trackWorkoutId),
596	      asc(competitionJudgeRotationsTable.startingHeat),
597	      asc(competitionJudgeRotationsTable.startingLane),
598	    ],
599	  })
600	}
601	
602	async function loadCrewJudgeAssignmentVersions(trackWorkoutIds: string[]) {
603	  if (trackWorkoutIds.length === 0) return []
604	
605	  const db = getDb()
606	  const rows = await db
607	    .select({
608	      id: judgeAssignmentVersionsTable.id,
609	      trackWorkoutId: judgeAssignmentVersionsTable.trackWorkoutId,
610	      version: judgeAssignmentVersionsTable.version,
611	      publishedAt: judgeAssignmentVersionsTable.publishedAt,

613	      notes: judgeAssignmentVersionsTable.notes,

616	      publisherLastName: userTable.lastName,

619	    .from(judgeAssignmentVersionsTable)
620	    .leftJoin(

625	      inArray(judgeAssignmentVersionsTable.trackWorkoutId, trackWorkoutIds),

629	      desc(judgeAssignmentVersionsTable.version),

632	  return rows.map((row): CrewJudgeAssignmentVersion => {

637	    return {

649	
650	async function loadCrewJudgeActiveAssignments(
651	  activeVersionIds: string[],
652	  judges: CrewJudgeVolunteer[],
653	): Promise<CrewJudgeHeatAssignment[]> {
654	  if (activeVersionIds.length === 0) return []
655	
656	  const db = getDb()
657	  const rows = await db
658	    .select({
659	      id: judgeHeatAssignmentsTable.id,
660	      heatId: judgeHeatAssignmentsTable.heatId,
661	      trackWorkoutId: competitionHeatsTable.trackWorkoutId,
662	      heatNumber: competitionHeatsTable.heatNumber,
663	      membershipId: judgeHeatAssignmentsTable.membershipId,
664	      invitationId: judgeHeatAssignmentsTable.invitationId,
665	      rotationId: judgeHeatAssignmentsTable.rotationId,
666	      versionId: judgeHeatAssignmentsTable.versionId,
667	      laneNumber: judgeHeatAssignmentsTable.laneNumber,
668	      position: judgeHeatAssignmentsTable.position,
669	      isManualOverride: judgeHeatAssignmentsTable.isManualOverride,
670	    })
671	    .from(judgeHeatAssignmentsTable)
672	    .innerJoin(
673	      competitionHeatsTable,
674	      eq(judgeHeatAssignmentsTable.heatId, competitionHeatsTable.id),
675	    )
676	    .where(inArray(judgeHeatAssignmentsTable.versionId, activeVersionIds))
677	    .orderBy(
678	      asc(competitionHeatsTable.trackWorkoutId),
679	      asc(competitionHeatsTable.heatNumber),
680	      asc(judgeHeatAssignmentsTable.laneNumber),
681	    )
682	  const judgeByAssigneeId = new Map(
683	    judges.map((judge) => [judge.membershipId, judge]),
684	  )
685	
686	  return rows.map((row) => {
687	    // The assignment references either a membership or an invitation; resolve
688	    // the canonical assignee id to look the judge up in the roster.
689	    const assigneeId = row.membershipId ?? row.invitationId ?? ""
690	    return {
691	      ...row,
692	      membershipId: assigneeId,
693	      volunteer: judgeByAssigneeId.get(assigneeId) ?? null,
694	    }
695	  })

697	
698	function groupVersionsByWorkout(
699	  trackWorkoutIds: string[],
700	  versions: CrewJudgeAssignmentVersion[],
701	) {
702	  const grouped: Record<string, CrewJudgeAssignmentVersion[]> =
703	    Object.fromEntries(
704	      trackWorkoutIds.map((trackWorkoutId) => [trackWorkoutId, []]),
705	    )
706	
707	  for (const version of versions) {
708	    grouped[version.trackWorkoutId]?.push(version)
709	  }
710	
711	  return grouped

714	async function assertCrewJudgeRotationsPublishable(
715	  eventId: string,
716	  trackWorkoutId: string,
717	) {
718	  const [heats, rotations] = await Promise.all([
719	    loadCrewJudgeHeats(eventId),
720	    loadCrewJudgeRotations([trackWorkoutId]),
721	  ])
722	  const eventHeats = heats.filter(
723	    (heat) => heat.trackWorkoutId === trackWorkoutId,
724	  )
725	  const issues = validateCrewJudgeRotationDrafts({
726	    heats: eventHeats,
727	    rotations: rotations.map(toCrewJudgeRotationDraft),
728	  })
729	
730	  if (hasCrewJudgeRotationErrors(issues)) {
731	    throw new Error(
732	      issues
733	        .filter((issue) => issue.severity === "error")
734	        .map((issue) => issue.message)
735	        .join(" "),
736	    )
737	  }
738	}
739	
740	async function materializeCrewJudgeRotations(
741	  db: RotationQueryDb,
742	  trackWorkoutId: string,
743	): Promise<MaterializedJudgeAssignmentForVersion[]> {
744	  const [heats, rotations] = await Promise.all([
745	    loadCrewJudgeHeatsForTrackWorkout(db, trackWorkoutId),
746	    db.query.competitionJudgeRotationsTable.findMany({
747	      where: eq(competitionJudgeRotationsTable.trackWorkoutId, trackWorkoutId),
748	    }),
749	  ])
750	  const heatByNumber = new Map(heats.map((heat) => [heat.heatNumber, heat]))
751	  const seen = new Set<string>()
752	  const assignments: MaterializedJudgeAssignmentForVersion[] = []
753	
754	  for (const rotation of rotations) {
755	    for (let heatIndex = 0; heatIndex < rotation.heatsCount; heatIndex++) {
756	      const heatNumber = rotation.startingHeat + heatIndex
757	      const heat = heatByNumber.get(heatNumber)
758	      if (!heat) continue
759	
760	      const laneNumber = getCrewJudgeRotationLane({
761	        startingLane: rotation.startingLane,
762	        heatIndex,
763	        laneCount: heat.laneCount,
764	        laneShiftPattern: rotation.laneShiftPattern,
765	      })
766	      if (laneNumber < 1 || laneNumber > heat.laneCount) continue
767	
768	      const assigneeId = getRotationAssigneeId(rotation)
769	      const key = `${heat.id}:${assigneeId}`
770	      if (seen.has(key)) continue
771	      seen.add(key)
772	
773	      assignments.push({
774	        heatId: heat.id,
775	        membershipId: rotation.membershipId,
776	        invitationId: rotation.invitationId,
777	        rotationId: rotation.id,
778	        laneNumber,
779	        position: VOLUNTEER_ROLE_TYPES.JUDGE,
780	      })
781	    }
782	  }
783	
784	  return assignments
785	}
786	
787	async function loadCrewJudgeHeatsForTrackWorkout(
788	  db: RotationQueryDb,
789	  trackWorkoutId: string,
790	): Promise<CrewJudgeHeat[]> {
791	  const heatRows = await db
792	    .select({
793	      id: competitionHeatsTable.id,
794	      trackWorkoutId: competitionHeatsTable.trackWorkoutId,
795	      heatNumber: competitionHeatsTable.heatNumber,
796	      scheduledTime: competitionHeatsTable.scheduledTime,
797	      durationMinutes: competitionHeatsTable.durationMinutes,
798	      venueName: competitionVenuesTable.name,
799	      venueLaneCount: competitionVenuesTable.laneCount,
800	    })
801	    .from(competitionHeatsTable)
802	    .leftJoin(
803	      competitionVenuesTable,
804	      eq(competitionHeatsTable.venueId, competitionVenuesTable.id),
805	    )
806	    .where(eq(competitionHeatsTable.trackWorkoutId, trackWorkoutId))
807	    .orderBy(asc(competitionHeatsTable.heatNumber))
808	
809	  const heatAssignmentRows = await loadCrewJudgeHeatLaneAssignments(
810	    db,
811	    heatRows.map((heat) => heat.id),
812	  )
813	
814	  return toCrewJudgeHeats(heatRows, heatAssignmentRows)
815	}
816	
817	async function loadCrewJudgeHeatLaneAssignments(
818	  db: Pick<DbClient, "select">,
819	  heatIds: string[],
820	): Promise<CrewJudgeHeatLaneAssignmentRow[]> {
821	  if (heatIds.length === 0) return []
822	
823	  return db
824	    .select({
825	      heatId: competitionHeatAssignmentsTable.heatId,
826	      laneNumber: competitionHeatAssignmentsTable.laneNumber,
827	    })
828	    .from(competitionHeatAssignmentsTable)
829	    .where(inArray(competitionHeatAssignmentsTable.heatId, heatIds))
830	}
831	
832	function toCrewJudgeHeats(
833	  heatRows: CrewJudgeHeatRow[],
834	  heatAssignmentRows: CrewJudgeHeatLaneAssignmentRow[],
835	): CrewJudgeHeat[] {
836	  const occupiedLanesByHeat = new Map<string, Set<number>>()
837	
838	  for (const assignment of heatAssignmentRows) {
839	    if (!assignment.laneNumber) continue
840	    const lanes = occupiedLanesByHeat.get(assignment.heatId) ?? new Set()
841	    lanes.add(assignment.laneNumber)
842	    occupiedLanesByHeat.set(assignment.heatId, lanes)
843	  }
844	
845	  return heatRows.map((heat) => {
846	    const occupiedLanes = Array.from(
847	      occupiedLanesByHeat.get(heat.id) ?? [],
848	    ).sort((a, b) => a - b)
849	
850	    return {
851	      id: heat.id,
852	      trackWorkoutId: heat.trackWorkoutId,
853	      heatNumber: heat.heatNumber,
854	      scheduledTime: heat.scheduledTime,
855	      durationMinutes: heat.durationMinutes,
856	      venueName: heat.venueName,
857	      laneCount: getCrewJudgeHeatLaneCount({
858	        venueLaneCount: heat.venueLaneCount,
859	        occupiedLanes,
860	      }),
861	      occupiedLanes,
862	    }
863	  })
864	}
865	
866	/**
867	 * Canonical assignee id for a stored rotation: the membership id for account-
868	 * backed judges, otherwise the invitation id for imported / manual judges.
869	 */
870	function getRotationAssigneeId(
871	  rotation: Pick<CompetitionJudgeRotation, "membershipId" | "invitationId">,
872	): string {
873	  return rotation.membershipId ?? rotation.invitationId ?? ""
874	}
875	
876	/**
877	 * Split a canonical assignee id into the membership / invitation columns. An
878	 * invitation id (tinv_) sets invitationId; anything else is treated as a
879	 * membership id.
880	 */
881	function toJudgeAssigneeColumns(assigneeId: string): {
882	  membershipId: string | null
883	  invitationId: string | null
884	} {
885	  if (assigneeId.startsWith("tinv_")) {
886	    return { membershipId: null, invitationId: assigneeId }
887	  }
888	  return { membershipId: assigneeId, invitationId: null }
889	}
890	
891	function toCrewJudgeRotationDraft(
892	  rotation: Pick<
893	    CompetitionJudgeRotation,
894	    | "id"
895	    | "membershipId"
896	    | "invitationId"
897	    | "startingHeat"
898	    | "startingLane"
899	    | "heatsCount"
900	    | "laneShiftPattern"
901	  >,
902	): CrewJudgeRotationDraft {
903	  return {
904	    id: rotation.id,
905	    // Use the canonical assignee id so rotation dedup / lane-conflict checks
906	    // work uniformly for membership- and invitation-based judges.
907	    membershipId: getRotationAssigneeId(rotation),
908	    startingHeat: rotation.startingHeat,
909	    startingLane: rotation.startingLane,
910	    heatsCount: rotation.heatsCount,
911	    laneShiftPattern: rotation.laneShiftPattern,
912	  }
913	}
914	
915	export function getJudgeName(judge: {
916	  firstName: string | null
917	  lastName: string | null
918	  email?: string | null
919	}) {
920	  return (
921	    [judge.firstName, judge.lastName].filter(Boolean).join(" ") ||
922	    judge.email ||
923	    "Unknown judge"
924	  )
925	}
926	
927	function normalizeOptionalText(value: string | null | undefined) {
928	  const trimmed = value?.trim()
929	  return trimmed ? trimmed : null
930	}
931	
932	export const CREW_JUDGE_LANE_SHIFT_PATTERNS = [
933	  LANE_SHIFT_PATTERN.STAY,
934	  LANE_SHIFT_PATTERN.SHIFT_RIGHT,
935	] as const

78	  /** Called when judge selection changes (for highlighting existing rotations) */
